creator: stephane.legrand@wanadoo.fr
text:
According to http://www.netect.com/advisory_0209.html, the
latest versions of ProFTPD and Wu-ftpd seem have a security hole.

	By the way, if a nice commiter could :

	- remove me as the maintainer of ProFTPD.
	- remove the port called "proftpd-devel". It's superseded by
the "proftpd" port.

Fix: 

Patches are availables for the both servers. All the
informations are in http://www.netect.com/advisory_0209.html
